creator: markusalbertgraf@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD port overview for pingus-0.7.6_2

http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=games&portname=pingus

shows that all platforms are available and green.

But these are not in the repositories:
93amd64-default
93amd64-quaterly
93i386-default
93i386-quaterly
101amd64-default
101amd64-quaterly
101i386-default
101i386-quaterly
110amd64-quaterly
110i386-quatrely
head-amd64-default
head-i386-default

These are in the repositories:
84amd64-default
84i386-default
110amd64-default
110i386-default

I do not suspect that there is anything wrong with the port itself, as it builds fine on my machine FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p1 amd64.
